FAQ

FAQs: WhatsApp API Pricing in Mexico

Common questions about WhatsApp Business API costs for Mexico.

  • How much does WhatsApp API cost in Mexico?

    WhatsApp Business API pricing in Mexico varies by message category. Marketing messages are typically the most expensive, while service conversations (customer-initiated) are free within the 24-hour window. Use the pricing table above for current rates.

  • Are WhatsApp API prices the same worldwide?

    No, Meta sets different per-message rates for each country. Pricing depends on the recipient's country, the message category (marketing, utility, authentication, or service), and whether the conversation is within the 24-hour customer service window.

  • What is the cheapest message type in Mexico?

    Service conversations are free when the customer initiates the chat and you respond within 24 hours. For business-initiated messages, utility templates are generally the most affordable option in Mexico.

  • Does WhatsTeam charge extra on top of Meta fees?

    WhatsTeam subscription plans are priced independently from Meta's per-message fees. Your WhatsTeam plan covers platform features (team inbox, AI chatbots, campaigns), while Meta charges separately for each template message delivered.

  • How can I reduce WhatsApp API costs in Mexico?

    Respond within the 24-hour window to keep service conversations free. Use utility templates instead of marketing when appropriate. Batch your campaigns to optimize volumes, and leverage AI chatbots to handle common queries without template messages.
